onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pc_feel to {{pc_feel}}]
Set physics feel to {{pc_feel}}. Floaty=gravity 500, restitution 0.6; Balanced=gravity 800, restitution 0.3; Heavy=gravity 1200, restitution 0.15.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pc_settling to {{pc_settling}}]
Set settling speed to {{pc_settling}}. Slow=damping 1.5; Normal=damping 3.0; Quick=damping 6.0. Affects how fast items come to rest.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pc_chaos to {{pc_chaos}}]
Set high chaos mode to {{pc_chaos}}. When on: high restitution + low damping = more unpredictable bouncing.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pt_gravity to {{pt_gravity}}]
Set gravity to {{pt_gravity}} px/s² in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pt_restitution to {{pt_restitution}}]
Set restitution (bounciness) to {{pt_restitution}} in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pt_damping to {{pt_damping}}]
Set friction damping to {{pt_damping}} per second in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pt_max_velocity to {{pt_max_velocity}}]
Set max velocity to {{pt_max_velocity}} px/s in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/category.schema.json, set pt_pos_correction to {{pt_pos_correction}}]
Set position correction factor to {{pt_pos_correction}} in scripts/Constants.ts.
